Class JsonConcurrentSkipListMap

java.lang.Object
java.util.AbstractMap<String,Object>
java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentSkipListMap<String,Object>
com.webfirmframework.wffweb.json.JsonConcurrentSkipListMap
All Implemented Interfaces:
JsonBaseNode, JsonMapNode, JsonPart, Serializable, Cloneable, ConcurrentMap<String,Object>, ConcurrentNavigableMap<String,Object>, Map<String,Object>, NavigableMap<String,Object>, SequencedMap<String,Object>, SortedMap<String,Object>
public non-sealed class JsonConcurrentSkipListMap extends ConcurrentSkipListMap<String,Object> implements JsonMapNode, Serializable
To parse json object string: 
JsonMapNode jsonMap = JsonConcurrentSkipListMap.parse("""
            {
            "key" : "value",
            "key1" : "value1"
            }
            """);
// To get value
String key1Value = jsonMap.getValueAsString("key1");

// Prints value
System.out.println("key1Value = " + key1Value); // key1Value = value1

String jsonString = jsonMap.toJsonString();
// Prints json string
System.out.println("jsonString = " + jsonString); // jsonString = {"key1":"value1","key":"value"}
Since:
12.0.11
See Also:

    class CustomJsonMap extends JsonMap { } class CustomList extends JsonList { } JsonMap jsonMap = new JsonMap(); jsonMap.put("number", new JsonValue("14", JsonValueType.NUMBER)); jsonMap.put("string", "string value"); jsonMap.put("bool", true); jsonMap.put("fornull1", new JsonValue()); jsonMap.put("fornull2", null); JsonList jsonList = new JsonList(); jsonList.add("one"); jsonList.add("two"); jsonMap.put("jsonList", jsonList); CustomJsonMap convertedObject = jsonMap.convertTo( CustomJsonMap::new, CustomJsonMap::put, CustomList::new, CustomList::add, true);

      public static JsonConcurrentSkipListMap parse(String json)
